mdkg is a local-first CLI for deterministic project memory in git.

Primary loop:
- mdkg init --llm
- mdkg new <type> "<title>"
- mdkg search "<query>"
- mdkg show <id>
- mdkg next
- mdkg pack <id>
- mdkg task start <id>
- mdkg task update <id> ...
- mdkg task done <id>
- mdkg validate

Optional agent-ready bootstrap:
- mdkg init --omni

Directory structure:
- .mdkg/core/ rules and pinned docs
- .mdkg/design/ product and architecture docs
- .mdkg/work/ work graph and checkpoints
- .mdkg/templates/ node templates
- .mdkg/skills/ Agent Skills packages
- .mdkg/index/ generated cache

Node schema summary:
- required frontmatter: id, type, title, created, updated
- common work fields: status, priority
- explicit links: epic, parent, relates, blocked_by, blocks, prev, next
- optional work-item skills: skills: [slug,...]

Agent rules:
- Prefer mdkg packs over ad-hoc file reading.
- Treat rules, EDDs, DECs, PRDs, and task nodes as authoritative over chat memory.
- Use mdkg show <id> for targeted inspection and mdkg show <id> --meta for card-only output.
- Use mdkg skill list or mdkg skill search to discover skills.
- Use mdkg skill show <slug> to load a full skill only when needed.
- Use mdkg task start/update/done instead of hand-editing task, bug, and test markdown for routine lifecycle changes.
- Use mdkg event enable before expecting automatic JSONL provenance from mutating commands.
- Use CLI_COMMAND_MATRIX.md as the canonical command and flag reference.
- Run mdkg validate before marking work done.

Pack guidance:
- mdkg pack <id>
- mdkg pack <id> --profile concise --dry-run --stats
- mdkg pack <id> --skills auto --skills-depth full

Skill filename policy:
- SKILL.md is canonical
- SKILLS.md is compatibility-only on read
- both files in one skill directory is invalid

Event logging:
- mdkg event enable
- mdkg event append --kind <kind> --status <status> --refs <id,...>
- automatic events append only after event logging is enabled

See also:
- README.md
- CLI_COMMAND_MATRIX.md
- AGENT_PROMPT_SNIPPET.md
- PACK_EXAMPLES.md
